title: Silky Buttery Vietnamese Noodles Pho
description: A comforting, vegan-friendly noodle soup that blends silky rice noodles, a buttery broth, dark chocolate chips, and crunchy pickles for a unique, soothing flavor.

ingredients.name: vegan butter
ingredients.notes: use plant‑based butter for a creamy sauce

ingredients.name: rice noodles
ingredients.notes: use thin, flat rice noodles for the best texture

ingredients.name: vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: low sodium, homemade or high‑quality store‑bought

instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a medium pot, add soy sauce, miso, salt, and pepper; simmer for 10 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
In a separate pot, cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions (about 3 minutes), then drain and rinse with cold water to stop the cooking process and set aside.
